g.title: booking.reservation:usr->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (usr) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: booking.reservation:capture_staff->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (capture_staff) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: booking.reservation:target_resource_type->booking.resource_type:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (target_resource_type) REFERENCES booking.resource_type(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: booking.reservation:target_resource->booking.resource:id

g.title: booking.reservation:request_lib->actor.org_unit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (request_lib) REFERENCES actor.org_unit(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: booking.reservation:pickup_lib->actor.org_unit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (pickup_lib) REFERENCES actor.org_unit(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: action.emergency_closing_reservation:reservation->booking.reservation:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (reservation) REFERENCES booking.reservation(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: action.reservation_transit_copy:reservation->booking.reservation:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (reservation) REFERENCES booking.reservation(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: booking.reservation_attr_value_map:reservation->booking.reservation:id
